description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden awning structure with a pitched roof and open front, resembling a carport or shelter. The roof is constructed from closely spaced wooden planks, forming a triangular gable with a symmetrical peak. The side and rear walls are made of horizontal wooden slats, while the base is supported by a brick or masonry foundation. The interior is open, with visible wooden rafters providing structural support for the roof. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for protecting vehicles or providing covered outdoor space in an urban or residential setting.
description: A robust, freestanding wooden awning with a pitched roof, open front, and brick foundation, designed for sheltering vehicles or outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, pitched roof, and visible interior rafters.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the open roof rafters and solid wooden back wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid wooden wall and the full height of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite rear angled view with exposed rafters and solid side wall.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding on ground with brick foundation
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid color wood planks with no decorative pattern
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts, beams, and rafters
